title: LE5 1TZ, Sofidel UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BJ6780IL/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:   Operator name: Sofidel UK Limited Installation name: Leicester Tissue Mill Permit number: EPR/BJ6780IL/V007  "
